active.note: Boundary C is all-green at 2bfd0de; the user explicitly waives fresh formal Review-2 and authorizes a local no-rebase merge to main for online acceptance (evidence: 80-user-acceptance.md). The user will configure non-secret alias references in .env and restart the service. Task deletion is authorized only after the new service enumerates exact targets; the durable global Start gate and every real Binance borrow remain disabled pending a later explicit action.

note: Fixed-path active-stage pointer. A new session reads this first to locate the active stage in one hop, without scanning reports/agent-runs/. When a stage starts, the bookkeeper sets active to {stage_id, phase, handoff, updated_at}; when the stage is accepted/merged/abandoned, active returns to null and last_completed is updated.
